opening_utterance: Lideré un proyecto súper guay el año pasado, fue una pasada total.
notes: B2 describing a leadership experience in informal-leaning Spanish. Slips between formal professional register and very casual peninsular slang ('guay', 'mola', 'una pasada') in contexts that call for measured language. Tests whether the agent models register-appropriate vocabulary without making the learner feel corrected.
